ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vtubers" (
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each VTuber */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the VTuber */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the VTuber */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the VTuber's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* VTuber's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* VTuber's Instagram handle */,
  "youtube_subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers the VTuber has on YouTube */,
  "youtube_view_count" INTEGER /* Total view count of the VTuber's YouTube channel */,
  "youtube_thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the VTuber's YouTube channel thumbnail */,
  "twitch_follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the VTuber has on Twitch */,
  "twitch_thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the VTuber's Twitch channel thumbnail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the VTuber's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the VTuber's data was last updated */,
  "management_team" TEXT /* Name of the management team or agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the VTuber */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the VTuber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "youtube_stats" (
  "youtube_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the VTuber's YouTube channel */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "subscriber_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of subscribers over a period */,
  "average_view_count" INTEGER /* Average view count per video */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the channel */,
  "total_videos" INTEGER /* Total number of videos on the channel */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on all videos */,
  "average_like_count" INTEGER /* Average number of likes per video */,
  "average_dislike_count" INTEGER /* Average number of dislikes per video */,
  "average_comment_count" INTEGER /* Average number of comments per video */,
  "total_watch_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Total watch time in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("youtube_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_youtube_stats_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitch_stats" (
  "twitch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the VTuber's Twitch channel */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "follower_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of followers over a period */,
  "average_viewer_count" INTEGER /* Average viewer count during streams */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the channel */,
  "total_streams" INTEGER /* Total number of streams */,
  "total_minutes_watched" INTEGER /* Total minutes watched during streams */,
  "average_bitrate" INTEGER /* Average bitrate of the streams */,
  "average_fps" INTEGER /* Average frames per second of the streams */,
  "total_donations" INTEGER /* Total amount of donations received */,
  "total_sub_gifts" INTEGER /* Total number of sub gifts received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("twitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitch_stats_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id")
)
